scenarios.name: Operator sees Smackerel metrics scraped

evidenceRefs.location: scripts/commands/config.sh — PROMETHEUS_* required_value extraction + envsubst render block + deploy bundle staging
config/generated/prometheus.yml — rendered output proving SST flow

linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: SCN-049-M01: config/prometheus/prometheus.yml.tmpl declares smackerel-core + smackerel-ml jobs addressed by compose service name
Scope 1 DoD: SCN-049-M01: config/smackerel.yaml carries monitoring.prometheus.* + per-env prometheus_host_port + prometheus_volume_name keys
Scope 1 DoD: SCN-049-M01: scripts/commands/config.sh extracts every monitoring var via required_value and renders prometheus.yml via envsubst
Scope 1 DoD: SCN-049-M01: T-049-001 TestMonitoringScrapeContract_LiveTemplate passes
Scope 1 DoD: SCN-049-M01: T-049-002 TestMonitoringRender_LiveTemplate passes with all four substitutions applied

scenarios.name: Alerts cover deployment failure modes

evidenceRefs.location: internal/metrics/*.go + ml/app/metrics.py — backing metrics every alert expression references

linkedDoD: Scope 2 DoD: SCN-049-M02: config/prometheus/alerts.yml declares all 8 required alerts (Core/MLUnavailable, IngestionStalled, NATSDeadLetterPressure, DBPoolSaturated, MLEmbeddingStarvation, AlertDeliveryFailing, BackupStale)
Scope 2 DoD: SCN-049-M02: every alert expression references a metric emitted by internal/metrics/*.go or ml/app/metrics.py (or the Prometheus builtin `up`)
Scope 2 DoD: SCN-049-M02: T-049-004 TestMonitoringAlertsContract_LiveFile passes with 8 required alerts + 54-metric known-emitted set
Scope 2 DoD: SCN-049-M02: adversarial TestMonitoringAlertsContract_AdversarialFabricatedMetric rejects a non-existent metric reference

scenarios.name: Metrics endpoints remain inside the operator boundary

evidenceRefs.location: deploy/compose.deploy.yml — prometheus port uses ${HOST_BIND_ADDRESS:?...} fail-loud per Gate G028
docker-compose.yml — prometheus binds 127.0.0.1:${PROMETHEUS_HOST_PORT} on dev stack
docs/Operations.md::Monitoring Stack — Metrics Access Boundary section

linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: SCN-049-M03: deploy/compose.deploy.yml prometheus service uses fail-loud ${HOST_BIND_ADDRESS:?...} substitution (Gate G028 NO-DEFAULTS)
Scope 1 DoD: SCN-049-M03: docker-compose.yml prometheus binds to 127.0.0.1 only on dev stack
Scope 1 DoD: SCN-049-M03: docs/Operations.md Metrics Access Boundary table assigns reverse-proxy/Alertmanager/Grafana to deploy-adapter overlay
Scope 1 DoD: SCN-049-M03: T-049-003 TestMonitoringBindContract proves NO wildcard binds anywhere in either compose file
Scope 1 DoD: SCN-049-M03: extended T-042 TestComposeContract_LiveFile blocks regression to literal bind on prometheus port

scenarios.name: Monitoring stack obeys spec 045 hardening

evidenceRefs.location: deploy/compose.deploy.yml — prometheus declares read_only:true, tmpfs /tmp, cap_drop: [ALL], user: nobody, deploy.resources.limits via ${PROMETHEUS_*_LIMIT:?...}

linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: SCN-049-M04: deploy/compose.deploy.yml prometheus declares read_only:true with /tmp tmpfs allowlist only
Scope 1 DoD: SCN-049-M04: deploy/compose.deploy.yml prometheus declares cpus + memory via fail-loud ${PROMETHEUS_CPU_LIMIT:?...} / ${PROMETHEUS_MEMORY_LIMIT:?...}
Scope 1 DoD: SCN-049-M04: deploy/compose.deploy.yml prometheus drops all capabilities, runs as user nobody, sets no-new-privileges
Scope 1 DoD: SCN-049-M04: spec 045 contract tests TestComposeResourceContract_LiveFile + TestFilesystemContract_LiveFile pass with prometheus added to the contract set
